description: The system shall allow a user to create an account using an email and a password.
The system shall send a unique verification link via email immediately after registration.
The system shall allow the user to request a resend of the verification link every 60 seconds.
The system shall require the user to verify their email before the first login.
Email must be unique across all accounts.
The verification link sent via email is valid for 24 hours.
The password must contain at least one uppercase letter, one lowercase letter, one numeric digit, and one special character (e.g., @, #, $, %, ^, &, *).
Consecutive spaces in the password are forbidden.
The password cannot contain the user's explicit email prefix or username.
Email format must contain '@' and a domain.
Password length must be between 8 and 12 characters inclusive.
When a user tries to register with an already existing email, the system shall display a meaningful inline error message.
Email verification mechanism depends on an external email delivery service.
